— Raffaello Marrello, Founder

Junior stylists. Every appointment is senior.

The Work

Three disciplines.
One standard.

Hair & Style

The Cut.

Precision cutting and styling under Christopher Marrello, Creative Director. Haircuts, blowouts, and styling for all hair types.

View Services →
Colour

The Colour.

Balayage, ombré, highlights, and corrective colour under Mellissa Marrello, Colour Director. Precision work that holds.

View Services →
Spa

The Spa.

Facials, dermaplaning, oxygen treatments, microcurrent lifts, waxing, manicures, and pedicures. One appointment, complete care.

View Services →
The Team

Three generations.
One family.

Founder

Raffaello Marrello

The standard the team holds itself to. Over five decades in the craft. Still behind the chair.

Creative Director

Christopher Marrello

International stages. Editorial shoots. The precision behind every cut at Raffaello.

Colour Director

Mellissa Marrello

Corrective colour specialist. Precision balayage. The person Yorkville calls when the colour has to be right.
